gdpr.title: Data & Privacy

privacy.title: Privacy Policy

details.notice: Add the controller identification details before production launch.

controller.title: 1. Personal data controller
controller.intro: The controller of clients' personal data is the personal training provider operating the booking system on rezervace-pankova.online.
controller.processor: Technical administration of the system may be handled by an appointed IT services provider acting as a processor. The processor accesses personal data only to the extent necessary for operation, maintenance, security and support of the system.

data.title: 2. What data we process
items: identification and contact details: e-mail, first name, last name, phone number,
account data: login details in secured form, role, e-mail verification status,
booking data: reservation history, cancellations, attendance, training type, location and training time,
payment and credit data: credit transactions, packages, payment status, payment gateway identifiers,
training data: training notes, workout log, exercises, sets, repetitions, weights and related records if entered into the system,
communication data: system announcements, reminders, verification and password reset e-mails,
technical and security data: login times, IP address in server logs, error and security records.

purposes.title: 3. Purposes and legal bases
items: account, booking and credit management: contract performance,
payment and accounting records: contract performance and legal obligation,
transactional e-mails: contract performance and legitimate interest in informing the client,
system security, abuse prevention and incident handling: legitimate interest,
workout log and related notes: performance of the personal training service; final legal review is still needed for sensitive health-related information.

recipients.title: 4. Recipients and processors
items: Stripe - online payment processing and payment events.
SMTP/e-mail service - delivery of verification e-mails, password resets and system messages.
Hosting and technical administration - server, database, backup, monitoring and maintenance operations.
Public authorities - only where required by law.
recipients.noTracking: The application does not use analytics or marketing tracking unless explicitly stated otherwise.

retention.title: 5. Retention period
items: account and booking data: for the duration of the user account and afterwards for the period necessary to protect the provider's rights,
payment and accounting records: for the period required by accounting and tax regulations, typically up to 10 years depending on the record type,
training notes and workout log: during active cooperation, or until account deletion or an erasure request unless another legal basis prevents deletion,
verification tokens: usually 24 hours,
password reset tokens: usually 30 minutes,
server and security logs: for a limited period necessary for security and operations.

rights.title: 6. Client rights
items: right of access to personal data,
right to rectification of inaccurate data,
right to erasure where legal conditions are met,
right to restriction of processing,
right to data portability,
right to object to processing based on legitimate interest,
right to lodge a complaint with the Czech Office for Personal Data Protection.
rights.profileHint: The application provides data export and account deletion request options in Profile - Data & Privacy.

cookies.title: 7. Cookies and local storage
cookies.body: The application uses technically necessary mechanisms for login, security and storing basic application settings, such as language or cookie notice confirmation. It does not use marketing or analytics cookies.

security.title: 8. Security
items: passwords are stored only in hashed form,
communication with the application runs over HTTPS,
access to data is restricted by user role,
the database is backed up and production environment access is limited to authorized persons.

contact.title: 9. Contact
contact.body: Requests and questions regarding personal data protection should be sent to the controller contact listed in Article 1. [ADD FINAL GDPR AND SUPPORT E-MAIL.]

privacy.footer: Draft prepared for production release: April 2026. Add identification details and have the final wording reviewed before launch.

terms.title: Terms of Service

details.notice: Add the provider identification details before production launch.
details.phoneValue: [ADD PHONE NUMBER IF IT SHOULD BE LISTED]

provider.title: 1. Service provider
provider.intro: These terms govern the relationship between the personal training provider and the client when using the booking system on rezervace-pankova.online.
provider.technicalAdmin: Technical administration of the booking system may be handled by an appointed IT services provider. This provider is not the training provider or a contractual party to the client unless stated otherwise in a specific case.

account.title: 2. Registration and user account
items: Registration is available only through an invitation from the trainer.
The client must provide truthful and up-to-date information.
The client is responsible for securing their account and must not share login details with other persons.
The account can be deleted in profile settings or upon request sent to the provider.

credits.title: 3. Credit system and payments
items: The client purchases credit packages that can be used for training reservations.
The package price is shown before payment submission.
Payments are processed through the Stripe payment gateway.
Credits do not expire unless a specific offer states otherwise.
After successful payment, credits are added to the user account automatically after confirmation by the payment gateway.

booking.title: 4. Training reservation
items: A reservation becomes binding after confirmation in the booking system.
The number of credits corresponding to the selected training type is deducted for the reservation.
The client must arrive on time and inform the trainer about health limitations.
The provider may cancel or reschedule training for serious operational, health or organizational reasons.

cancellation.title: 5. Cancellation and credit refunds
items: [ADD EXACT CANCELLATION RULES: for example 24+ hours before = 100% credits returned.]
[ADD RULE FOR LATE CANCELLATION: for example less than 24 hours = no credit refund.]
If the provider cancels the training, the corresponding credits are returned to the client in full unless the parties agree on a replacement term.
Refunds for purchased credit packages are handled individually in accordance with these terms and applicable law.

withdrawal.title: 6. Withdrawal from contract
withdrawal.body: [ADD FINAL TEXT AFTER LEGAL REVIEW.] For online credit purchases and reservations of services tied to a specific term, the conditions under which the consumer may withdraw from the contract and when the statutory exception applies must be precisely defined.

complaints.title: 7. Complaints
items: Complaints or questions regarding credits, payments or reservations should be sent by the client to the provider contact listed in these terms.
[ADD COMPLAINT HANDLING DEADLINE, for example without undue delay and no later than within 30 days.]
In case of a technical payment error or missing credit top-up, the client should include the account e-mail, payment date and available payment identification details.

health.title: 8. Liability and health condition
items: The client exercises with regard to their health condition and must inform the trainer about limitations, injuries or health risks.
The provider does not replace medical care or medical diagnostics.
The client acknowledges that physical activity may involve reasonable risk of strain or injury.

privacy.title: 9. Personal data protection
privacy.prefix: Personal data processing is governed by the

disputes.title: 10. Out-of-court dispute resolution
disputes.prefix: The Czech Trade Inspection Authority is competent for out-of-court consumer dispute resolution, Štěpánská 567/15, 120 00 Prague 2, website:

final.title: 11. Final provisions
items: Relationships not governed by these terms are governed by the laws of the Czech Republic.
The provider may amend these terms, especially when services, prices, payment methods or legal regulations change.
The client will be informed of material changes in an appropriate manner, for example by e-mail or an in-app announcement.

terms.footer: Draft prepared for production release: April 2026. Add identification details and have the final wording reviewed before launch.
